mapper.select:
SELECT START_NUM, END_NUM2, (CURRENT_NUM, '0') AS CURRENT_NUM, PREFIX_STRING,
CURRENT_VAL,
CONVERT(VARCHAR, CURRENT_VAL) AS CURRENT_VAL,
YEAR_FLAG, YEAR_TYPE, MONTH_FLAG, DAY_FLAG FROM STOCDNCT WHERE GATE_CD = '100' #{gateCd}
AND COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd} AND DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' FOR UPDATE OF DOC_TYPE
